criteria_verification.criterion_text: SQLite migration adds `mode TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mode-a'` to `builds`
criteria_verification.evidence: src/forge/lifecycle/schema_v2.sql executes `ALTER TABLE builds ADD COLUMN mode TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'mode-a' CHECK (mode IN ('mode-a','mode-b','mode-c'))`. migrations.py bumped _SCHEMA_VERSION to 2 and added (2, 'schema_v2.sql') to _MIGRATIONS so existing v1 dbs get the additive migration and fresh dbs get v1+v2 in order. TestSqliteMigrationAddsModeColumn asserts: column exists post-migration, has TEXT type + NOT NULL + 'mode-a' default, schema_version contains both 1 and 2, migration is idempotent, and a legacy v1 db with a pre-existing row backfills to 'mode-a'.
